info.title: Bizarre Bazaar API
info.description: The Bizarre Bazaar API is a RESTful service for managing six unique collections: Fruits, Vegetables, Legumes, Colors, Animals, and Movies. Each collection supports full CRUD operations with pagination and sorting.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Add a new fruit to the collection.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

get.description: Retrieve a single fruit by its unique identifier.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

404.description: Not Found - resource does not exist

delete.description: Permanently remove a fruit from the collection.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

404.description: Not Found - resource does not exist
